channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: Pentagon boss claims Iran now has ‘no navy, no navy leader’
item.description: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth has said that Iran war is 'stuff for the history books'.

item.title: Trump says Iran ‘lousy fighters but great negotiators’
item.description: President Trump has said Iran is “begging to make a deal”, describing them as “lousy fighters but great negotiators".

item.title: Tehran’s’tollbooth’: How Iran picks who to let through Strait of Hormuz
item.description: Iran has blocked the passage of vessels carrying 20 percent of the world’s oil and liquefied natural gas supplies.

item.title: Pakistan says it is mediating US-Iran talks
item.description: Pakistan says it is mediating indirect talks between the US and Iran aimed at ending the war.

item.title: Russian officials meet US counterparts as Moscow denies aiding Iran
item.description: Kremlin spokesperson says talks are part of '​necessary dialogue' with Washington as war in Ukraine continues.

item.title: Iranian naval chief killed in attack, Israel says
item.description: Israel says it has killed IRGC naval commander Alireza Tangsiri in a strike near Bandar Abbas by the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Teen volunteer paramedic killed in Israeli strike in Lebanon
item.description: This 15-year-old volunteer paramedic was killed alongside a colleague in an Israeli strike on Lebanon.

item.title: Damage in Israel from Iranian attacks
item.description: Video shows the aftermath of Iranian attacks in several cities across Israel.

item.title: Is Europe heading to an energy crisis?
item.description: Europe is bracing for a supply crunch and a price shock as the Iran conflict drags on.

item.title: Video: GCC chief says Iran charging for ships to pass Strait of Hormuz
item.description: GCC Secretary-General Jasem al-Budaiwi has accused Iran of imposing fees for ships to pass via the Strait of Hormuz.
